name: SES Maritar
description:
You are a salvage runner when you come across a ship in the void idly drifting along. Who knows what mysteries it holds?

Will you tear it apart? Pass it by? (of course you won't, why else are you here.) Or perhaps try to find what out had happened?

One warning for you all, if you want to 'understand' the Xenomorphs in here you can but if you don't want to do that feel free to only react when the bot talks in quotes. Otherwise the Xenomorphs talk to each other telepathically.

I hope you guys like this one, this is my very first bot and I felt these kind of scenarios were missing so I wanted to make something for it and decided to make it public.
creator: Buckwild228
